reasoning: Pulse duplicate of TRANSFORMATION_85. eckey can be NULL (from SSL_CTX_get_ex_data returning NULL) and is dereferenced at L17 in the else-else branch (HAVE_ECC=T AND !SSL_CTX_set_ecdh_auto). Genuine null dereference. No // ERROR at L17, new bug. PC has real flags HAVE_ECC AND !SSL_CTX_set_ecdh_auto plus restrictive library macros making it over-constrained.
